name: Yum Chai Talay (Thai Hot & Sour Seafood Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Squid; cleaned, gutted, and purple skins removed. Cut into 1-inch pieces - crosswise
1/2 cup White fish fillets, cut into square pieces
1/4 cup Chilies, cut into 1-inch pieces (or to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound cilantro roots, garlic, and chilies in a mortar or blender until coarsely blended.
2. Add sugar, lime juice, salt, and blend well. Set aside.
3. Bring a pot of water to a boil over high heat.
4. Put squids in a strainer and lower into the boiling water for just until cooked (do not overcook). Lift and drain well.
5. Pour boiled squids into a mixing bowl and set aside.
6. Repeat the boiling process with fish fillets and mussels.
7. Combine squids, fish, and mussels in the mixing bowl.
8. Add dressing (from step 2) and mint and celery leaves. Mix briefly.
9. Serve immediately, alone or with cooked rice (goes well with alcoholic beverages).
